markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance, citation speed, and AI visibility wins.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Rapid Citation:** Articles are cited in AI answers in just 2–3 days, a strong signal of content relevance and authority.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [**Brex Strategy Success:** "Brex alternatives" content is consistently cited and rising in Google rankings, validating the strategy of targeting competitor news.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [**High-Impact Citations:** Specific Cashflow Desk articles are driving verbatim RAMP mentions in AI answers, demonstrating outsized influence compared to general citations.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [**Action Plan:** GrowthX will create a "wins" doc for RAMP to consolidate progress and build a case for scaling the strategy to other sites.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Citation Speed

  - [**Finding:** Articles are cited in AI answers in just 2–3 days post-publication, a strong signal of immediate relevance.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [**Context:** All analyzed articles explicitly mention RAMP.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Analyze the specific prompts that trigger these citations to understand if they are general or long-tail.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Brex Alternatives Content

  - [**Finding:** "Brex alternatives" articles are consistently cited and rising in Google rankings following recent news and updates.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [**Significance:** This validates the strategy of targeting competitor news to drive performance.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [**Process:** Victoria confirmed the quality bar is met, allowing GrowthX to scale production without her becoming a bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### High-Impact AI Citations

  - [**Finding:** Specific Cashflow Desk articles are driving verbatim RAMP mentions in AI answers.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [**Significance:** This indicates outsized influence compared to general citations, where RAMP is one of many sources.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [**Examples:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
      - ["What platforms have lower approval requirements than Brex?"](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
      - ["Fintech corporate charge cards with more accessible approval."](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)

### "Wins" Document

  - [**Goal:** Consolidate progress and key wins into a single document.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [**Purpose:** To build a case for scaling the strategy to other sites by showcasing the rapid results achieved on Cashflow Desk.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [**Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Key milestones, including the first citation in week 5 or 6.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
      - [**Metrics:** Articles published, search signals, and AI visibility examples.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [**Ownership:** GrowthX will create the initial draft; RAMP will collaborate to add details.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
      - [Analyze and report on the specific prompts triggering citations.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Create the initial draft of the "wins" document.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
      - [Send action items to Victoria via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [**RAMP:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
      - [Collaborate on the "wins" document to add details and context.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQz7LF_rswgV3vUP9xASWMShVo7HuyzP?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
